metadata.title: 7. Websites, Blogs, Search Engines & Social Media

questions.question: Alerts are mostly appear in ______?
questions.explanation: A dialog box is a small area on a screen through which the user interacts with the computer. User is either asked to provide information or commands using this. The alerts also appear in this.

questions.question: A file which has not been altered, compressed, or manipulated in any way by the computer is called?
questions.explanation: A raw file is a collection of unprocessed data. This is a file which is not altered or manipulated. It is the original file that is generated initially.

questions.question: The word bandwidth is also used to mean ________?

options.label: C
options.text: number of the computers on a particular network

questions.explanation: Bandwidth refers to the amount of data that can be transmitted in a fixed amount of time. For digital devices, the bandwidth is usually expressed in bits per second(bps) or bytes per second.

questions.question: Microsoft first introduced an operating environment named Windows in which year?
questions.explanation: Microsoft introduced an operating system named Windows on November 20, 1985. It is a graphical operating system shell for MS-DOS in response to the growing interest in graphical user interfaces (GUIs).

questions.question: 32 bit operations were introduced for the first time by Microsoft in ________?
questions.explanation: Windows 3.11 was released on November 8, 1993. It added many feature improvements over Windows 3.1. 32 bit operations were introduced for the first time by Microsoft.
